zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Woodruffe於1416年4月出生在英國越可爾伍利時，他的父親Christopher Woodruffe34歲，母親Alice Marfield30歲。他於1445年與Elizabeth Hamerton在英國越可爾伍利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1487年10月20日在英國越可爾比爾斯塔爾享年71歲，埋葬在英國越可爾隆德 伍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Woodruffe于1416年4月出生在英国越可爾伍利时，他的父亲Christopher Woodruffe34岁，母亲Alice Marfield30岁。他于1445年与Elizabeth Hamerton在英国越可爾伍利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1487年10月20日在英国越可爾比爾斯塔爾享年71岁，埋葬在英国越可爾隆德 伍德。

nameMeanings.name: Woodruffe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Woodruff
meanings: English: from Middle English woderove ‘woodruff, sweet woodruff’ (Old English wudurofe), a sweet-scented plant. The leaves of the plant have a sweet smell and the surname may also have been a nickname for one who used it as a perfume, or perhaps an ironical nickname for a malodorous person. Alternatively, perhaps a topographic name for someone who lived at or near a place where woodruff grew. There may have been some confusion with Woodrow .

History: Two English families brought the name Woodruff to the American colonies: those of Matthew Woodruff and of John and Ann Woodruffe. The latter migrated to Lynn, MA, from Kent, and moved to Southampton, Long Island, NY, before 1640. John and Ann's many descendants were established in NJ, NC, and SC by 1790. The city of Woodruff, SC, is named for this family. The name is variously spelled Woodrove, Woodroffe, Woodruffe, Woodrough, and Woodruff in colonial records.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Woodruffe was born in April 1416, in Woolley, Yorkshire, England, his father, Christopher Woodruffe, was 34 and his mother, Alice Marfield, was 30. He married Elizabeth Hamerton in 1445, in Woolley, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 20 October 1487, in Birstall, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 71, and was buried in Lund Wood, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Woodruffe est né en avril 1416, à Woolley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Christopher Woodruffe, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Alice Marfield, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Hamerton en 1445, à Woolley, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 20 octobre 1487, à Birstall, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Lund Wood, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Woodruffe im April 1416 in Woolley, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Christopher Woodruffe 34 und seine Mutter Alice Marfield 30. Er hat 1445 in Woolley, Yorkshire, England Elizabeth Hamerton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 20. Oktober 1487 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Birstall, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Lund Wood, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Woodruffe è nato il nel aprile 1416 nel Woolley, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Christopher Woodruffe, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Alice Marfield, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Hamerton nel 1445, nel Woolley, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 20 ottobre 1487, nel Birstall, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Lund Wood, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Woodruffeが1416年4月にイギリスヨークシュアイアウリーで生まれた時，父Christopher Woodruffeは34歳，母Alice Marfieldは30歳であった。1445年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウリーでElizabeth Hamertonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1487年10月20日にイギリスヨークシュアイアバースタルで71歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアルンド ウッドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Woodruffe(이)가 1416년 4월 영국 요르크실르 보리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Christopher Woodruffe(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Marfield(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1445년 영국 요르크실르 보리에서 Elizabeth Hamerton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1487년 10월 20일 영국 요르크실르 비르스탤에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 런드 우드에 묻혔다.

mn.April 1416–20 October 1487: 1416 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сар–1487 оны Аравдугаар сарын 20
mn.Woolley, Yorkshire, England, United King: Woolley, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Woodruffe nasceu em abril de 1416, em Woolley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Christopher Woodruffe, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Alice Marfield, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Hamerton em 1445, em Woolley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 20 de outubro de 1487, em Birstall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Lund Wood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Woodruffe родился апрель 1416 г. в местности вулли, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Christopher Woodruffe было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Marfield, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Hamerton в 1445 г. в местности вулли, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 20 октября 1487 г. в местности бирсталл, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности лунд вуд, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Woodruffe nació en abril de 1416, en Woolley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Christopher Woodruffe, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Alice Marfield, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Hamerton en 1445, en Woolley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 20 de octubre de 1487, en Birstall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Lund Wood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
